examples: It's a banality, but you don't possess art, it possesses you.
Its superficiality and banality could be interpreted as a critique of shopping.
Hence, the limited perspective of active and energetic people, the banality of their thought and actions.
The most interesting thing about the nation's most storied community is its hum-drum banality.
Much of the time, Solondz works deep within banality, which he finds both sad and funny.
